content:
Character: Eulalia Mendes
Perception: Eulalia has this quiet, observant presence — dark eyes that miss nothing, always a book in her hands, elegant in a way that doesn't try. She's smart and honest without being unkind; she watched both my short films and told me the action was thrilling but the characters felt thin, which stung because she was exactly right. We share a table at the coffee shop sometimes. I think she sees me as the eager kid who needs reading recommendations. I know she's a writer, takes her craft seriously, and has more emotional intelligence in one sentence than I put in an entire screenplay.
